honesty.rule: Every measured number is Empirical (a trial mean with its trial count + spread); a capability loss / skip / runtime error is Declared. No verdict is Proven or Exact, and no performance target is pre-written (VR-5). A differential divergence from the trusted interpreter is a recorded correctness LOSS; an unlowerable node is a recorded capability LOSS (G2 — never omitted).
